creator: jim@nasby.net
text:
This is still an issue... I'm trying to install irssi-xmpp (via =
portinstall). portinstall installs gamin, then it installs =
gio-fam-backend, which blows up: "gio-querymodules: not found"

Interestingly, if I try to do make install from =
/usr/ports/irc/irssi-xmpp, it doesn't try to install gio-fam-backend, =
but it gives me a different error:
xmpp-servers.c:263: error: 'SIGINT' undeclared (first use in this =
function)
xmpp-servers.c:263: error: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only =
once
xmpp-servers.c:263: error: for each function it appears in.)
xmpp-servers.c:263: error: 'SIG_IGN' undeclared (first use in this =
function)
xmpp-servers.c:293: error: 'SIG_DFL' undeclared (first use in this =
function)

FreeBSD noel.decibel.org 8.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE #0: Thu Sep  2 =
19:38:40 CDT 2010     root@noel.decibel.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC =
 amd64
(I'm running make update right now, in case this is an issue in FreeBSD =
itself as opposed to ports).=
